# fly_app (Data Source)

Retrieves information about an existing Fly.io application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_app" "example" {
  name = "my-existing-app"
}

output "app_status" {
  value = data.fly_app.example.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the application to look up.

### Read-Only

- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the application.
- `network` (String) The network the app is attached to.
- `org_slug` (String) The slug of the organization the app belongs to.
- `status` (String) The current status of the application.
